stemHtml:
When a TCAS conflict has been solved, what is the correct procedure to be followed?
The pilot shall report “Clear of Conflict” and then…

options.a: Turn direct to the next waypoint of the FMS flight plan and select the closest altitude which does not cause a new TCAS conflict.
options.b: Return to the assigned routing and altitude in the most direct manner unless otherwise instructed by ATC.
options.c: Enter a holding pattern and resume previous altitude until further advised by ATC.
options.d: Continue on present heading and maintain altitude until further advised by ATC.
